ideas.content: Our buddy system for new hires works really well, everyone loves it
New hires get their laptop on day 2 or 3, not day 1
We could create short video walkthroughs of internal tools
Competitors onboard fully remote in 2 days, we take 2 weeks
The welcome pack with branded merch makes people feel included
There is no structured training plan, it is all ad-hoc
We could assign each new hire a 30-day challenge with milestones
Regulatory requirements for compliance training keep increasing each year

topic: Digital transformation at a mid-size manufacturer

ideas.content: Strong brand recognition in the Nordic market
Legacy ERP system from 2003, no one dares touch it
Government grants available for industry 4.0 adoption
Supply chain disruption risk if we switch systems mid-production
Experienced workforce with deep domain knowledge
Data is siloed across 7 different systems
Cloud-based MES could give real-time production visibility
Cybersecurity threats targeting manufacturing are rising fast
Low staff turnover means institutional knowledge is preserved
No digital skills training budget allocated
NPS score of 72, well above industry average
No dedicated customer success team
AI-driven churn prediction models are getting affordable
A major competitor just launched a loyalty programme
Our response time on support tickets is under 4 hours
We only reach out to customers when they complain
Already ISO 14001 certified
No one tracks Scope 3 emissions
EU taxonomy reporting requirements create a first-mover advantage if we comply early
Greenwashing accusations are increasing across the industry
Employee engagement on sustainability is high
Supply chain has zero transparency beyond tier 1
Carbon offset partnerships could be a quick win
New carbon border tax will increase raw material costs
Strong R&D team with 3 patents pending
Marketing budget is half of what competitors spend
Growing demand in the 25-35 age segment
A Chinese manufacturer is selling a similar product at 40% less
Existing distribution network covers 12 countries
Product-market fit has not been validated yet
Partnership with a well-known influencer could boost launch visibility
Raw material prices are volatile due to geopolitical tensions
Office costs dropped 30% since going hybrid
Hard to onboard juniors remotely
Could hire from anywhere in the EU now
Teams in different time zones struggle with async communication
Employee satisfaction went up after flexible hours
Company culture feels weaker, people do not know each other
Weekly all-hands has good attendance
Information gets lost between departments
Could set up a central knowledge base like Notion or Confluence
Staff are resistant to yet another new tool
Leadership is transparent about financials
No formal feedback channel, people just complain on Slack
Product is already localised in 4 languages
No legal team experienced in non-EU regulations
Southeast Asian market growing at 15% annually
Currency fluctuation risk in emerging markets
Strong reference customers in adjacent sectors
Localisation quality is uneven, some translations are machine-generated
Partnership with a local distributor could accelerate market entry
Established local competitors have deep political connections
Scalable cloud infrastructure handles traffic spikes well
Intellectual property protection is weak in some target countries
Solar panels on warehouse roof generate 20% of energy needs
Fleet vehicles still run on diesel
Electric delivery vans are becoming cost-competitive
New emission regulations take effect next year
Waste recycling programme reduced landfill by 60%
No budget allocated for green initiatives this fiscal year
Slack is universally adopted, no resistance
Too many channels, people miss important messages
Could integrate Slack with project management for automatic updates
Microsoft Teams is pushing hard into our industry, clients expect us to use it
Video conferencing quality is reliable
File sharing is fragmented across Google Drive, Dropbox, and email attachments
AI meeting summaries could save hours per week
Data privacy concerns with some collaboration tools under EU scrutiny
24/7 coverage already in place
Average resolution time is 48 hours, too slow
Chatbot could handle 40% of tier-1 questions
Customer expectations for instant response are rising
Support staff have deep product knowledge
Knowledge base is outdated, last updated 18 months ago
Self-service portal could reduce ticket volume
Negative reviews on Trustpilot are increasing
